introduction: Our commitment to providing accessible healthcare has been challenged by recent feedback on our booking processes. This presentation will explore the potential issues and identify improvement strategies.

subsections.heading: Analyzing MediConn's Current Booking System
subsections.content:
• Our Q4 2024 data shows that customers face an average delay of 12 minutes to reach a customer service representative during peak hours.
• In some instances, this wait time escalates to as high as 25 minutes, potentially causing frustration and impacting our customer satisfaction ratings.
• These delays are most pronounced during peak hours, which run from 9 AM to 12 PM EST.
• High wait times might be indicative of convoluted customer service processes that need streamlining or the lack of efficient patient-facing care management tools.
• The report from PatientEngagementHIT highlights that 60% of patients struggle with poor online booking tools and complex call center procedures.
• We need to explore whether the root cause lies in our booking platform's design or in the customer support processes.
• The goal should be to reduce wait times and improve the patient experience by simplifying processes or enhancing our digital tools.
subsections.justification: This content combines the provided insight with external market context to identify potential issues in MediConn's booking system and suggest areas for improvement.

subsections.heading: Evaluating Customer Support Interaction Processes
subsections.content:
• MediConn's customer support department is made up of 50 representatives
• The department is divided into two shifts to provide 24/7 support
• The customer support team utilizes CRM software, CareSupport, to manage calls
• Representatives undergo quarterly training for soft skills and technical knowledge
• The average call duration is approximately 4 minutes
• The customer support department resolved over 10,000 tickets in 2021
• The department has a first-call resolution rate of 78%
• The customer support team also handles email and live chat inquiries
subsections.justification: Although this content provides details about customer support, it doesn't identify if the support processes are convoluted or not, hence doesn't answer the DR Question.

subsections.heading: Identifying Root Causes of Patient Booking Struggles
subsections.content:
• In 2021, 3% of all calls were related to booking struggles
• The majority of booking struggles were reported by patients over the age of 60
• Most commonly, booking struggles were due to internet connectivity issues
• Phone booking requests are handled by a dedicated team of 10 representatives
• The company conducts bi-annual surveys to understand patient experiences
• MediConn offers a user guide and tutorial videos to assist with online booking
• Less than 1% of patients reported struggles with the corporate booking feature
• The Customer Support department has a protocol for escalating complex booking issues
subsections.justification: This content discusses patient booking struggles, but does not determine if the root cause is poor booking tool design or convoluted customer support processes.

conclusion: By identifying the weaknesses in our booking system and customer support processes, we can implement targeted improvements. This will ultimately enhance patient experience and drive higher customer retention.

image_queries.slide_title: Identifying Root Causes of Patient Booking Struggles
